titles.title: Veterans Prosthetics Advancement and Reform Act
Veterans Prosthetics Advancement and Reform Act
A bill to amend title 38, United States Code, to improve the provision of prosthetic and rehabilitative items and services by the Department of Veterans Affairs, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
Committee on Veterans' Affairs. Ordered to be reported without amendment favorably.

committee.name: Senate Veterans' Affairs
committee.activity: Markup By, Referred To, Referred To
